_comment: R1 export exclusion list — drops ERF, R2-only daily prices, and syndication work. To load: open dm-tool, press F12, paste:  localStorage.setItem('dm_tool_excel_export_selection:OMEGA DDL (Current)', JSON.stringify(<this object minus the _ keys>))  — then reopen the Excel preview.

_format.excludedCategoryKeys: category cate_code (none in R2 yet — SYNDSTAT isn't added)
